overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a foggy marshland at dusk. The character travels along a winding dirt path from open wetlands through a forested area, eventually approaching ancient stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh wetland with standing water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the marsh path surrounded by tall reeds and shallow pools

entered.detail: shallow pools of water reflecting the gray sky amidst the wetlands
tall green and brown reeds lining the left side of the path
muddy winding trail through the marshland
sparse deciduous trees visible in the misty distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open marshland at dusk, with pools of water and tall reeds surrounding the muddy path. The sky is overcast and hazy, with sparse trees visible in the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested nature trail with dense tree cover

events.description: path transitions from open marsh into denser forested area with thicker vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail as the environment shifts to woodland

entered.detail: thick cluster of deciduous and pine trees forming a woodland canopy
boulders and rock outcrops alongside the path
dense bushes and underbrush lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail winds through a denser forest section with thick vegetation and trees lining both sides. The marsh gives way to drier ground as the path curves through the woodland, with large rocks and boulders appearing alongside the route.

events.description: ancient stone ruins become visible ahead at the end of the forest path

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone ruins with swords on back, moving toward the structure

entered.detail: ancient stone structure with broken walls and collapsed sections emerging from the forest
weathered stone wall partially covered in moss and vegetation
broken stone archway entrance to the ancient structure

segments.scene_description: The path leads toward ancient stone ruins emerging from the forest mist. The structure becomes increasingly prominent as the character approaches, with broken walls, rubble, and a weathered stone archway visible at the end of the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy marshland that gradually transitions into a dense forest and culminates at ancient stone ruins. It begins on a muddy path surrounded by pools of water and tall reeds under an overcast, misty sky. As the trail winds forward, the open wetlands give way to drier ground and thick vegetation, with the scene shifting into a wooded area lined with large rocks and boulders. The path then leads deeper into the forest mist before finally opening up to reveal weathered stone walls, rubble, and a prominent archway of an ancient ruin.
